//: Per-project config for the devops plugin. Copy to project root as .governance.json (/devops:init does this).

adr.comment: dir: this plugin's ADR folder inside the pulled ADR repo (e.g. adr/devops); the cache reporter scans it recursively. autoSync: DEFAULT OFF. When true, `docs/adr-cache.mjs --ensure` fast-forwards the ADR submodule to upstreamBranch BEFORE fingerprinting (fetch + `git merge --ff-only` — never rewrites the branch ref, so unpushed local commits are never orphaned; a diverged branch fails the FF and falls back to on-disk ADRs; skipped entirely when $CI is set, so headless/CI runs stay reproducible). Leave OFF to advance ADRs only when you deliberately bump the submodule pointer (recommended — an auto-advance dirties the superproject working tree, which collides with the clean-tree DoD). upstreamBranch: branch to fast-forward from.

protected.//: Consumer-facing self-service ADR: templates, authoring flow, onboarding. One consumer-reviewer report (usability + decision-quality) clears these.
